languages.text: "Мне приятно ваше внимание, Светлейш{mf|ий|ая}. Что именно вы хотите узнать?"
"I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
languages.original_text: "Мне приятно ваше внимание, Светлейш{mf|ий|ая}. Что именно вы хотите узнать?"

traits.locale_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
"I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
"I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
"I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"

languages.text: 「ご意向にございます、艦長様」

traits.locale_text: 「ご意向にございます、艦長様」

languages.text: "İlginizi kazanmış olmaktan büyük mutluluk duyuyorum Lord Kaptan. Tam olarak ne öğrenmek istersiniz?"
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: "İlginizi kazanmış olmaktan büyük mutluluk duyuyorum Lord Kaptan. Tam olarak ne öğrenmek istersiniz?"

languages.text: «Me alegro de haber merecido su atención, noble Lord Capitán. ¿Qué quiere saber, exactamente?».
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: «Me alegro de haber merecido su atención, noble Lord Capitán. ¿Qué quiere saber, exactamente?».

languages.text: “能得到您的关注是我的荣幸，尊贵的舰长大人。您具体想了解什么？”
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: “能得到您的关注是我的荣幸，尊贵的舰长大人。您具体想了解什么？”

languages.text: « Je me réjouis d'avoir éveillé votre attention, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Que voulez-vous savoir, au juste ? »
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: « Je me réjouis d'avoir éveillé votre attention, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Que voulez-vous savoir, au juste ? »

languages.text: "Ich freue mich, dass Ihr mir Eure Aufmerksamkeit schenkt, gütiger Lord Captain. Was genau wollt Ihr wissen?"
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
